subcodes.first_line: O my well-beloved daughter of the Kingdom! The letter thou hadst written to Dr. Esslemont was forwarded by him to the Land of Desire
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دختر عزیز ملکوتی من نامه که بجناب دکتور اسلمانت مرقوم نموده بودی آن نامه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @the ephemeral and the eternal, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual transformation, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar]
